title: Remove selected image and two card elements from BrideGroomEntrySection and DecorSection

requirements.summary: Remove the image element from the third card in BrideGroomEntrySection
acceptanceCriteria: The image element inside the third card of BrideGroomEntrySection (section[7]) is no longer rendered.
The rest of the card content remains intact and layout is not broken.

file_operations.description: Remove the element from the third card (the one with 'Fog & Smoke Effects' title). The card structure and text content should remain, only the image tag within the card's inner div should be deleted.

requirements.summary: Remove the fourth card element from DecorSection
acceptanceCriteria: The fourth card/item in section[8]'s content grid is no longer rendered.
The surrounding cards and layout remain intact.

file_operations.description: Remove the fourth card element (likely the 'Lighting Design' card) from the DecorSection grid. Delete the entire card div and its contents, keeping the first three cards intact.

requirements.summary: Remove the fifth card element from DecorSection
acceptanceCriteria: The fifth card/item in section[8]'s content grid is no longer rendered.
The surrounding cards and layout remain intact.

file_operations.description: Remove the fifth card element from the DecorSection grid if it exists. Delete the entire card div and its contents. After this change, DecorSection should display only the first three cards.
